page_content:
ARTT481 Advanced Specialization Seminar (3 Credits)

Seminar combines contemporary art theory, criticism, professional practice and career preparation in relation to students works from all areas of specialization.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Art department.

ARTT487 Capstone for Citation in Interdisciplinary Multimedia and Technology (1 Credit)

Independent study: a paper or website synthesizing the various citation learning experiences.
